Issue.create.description: Triggered when a new issue is created in Linear

Issue.update.description: Triggered when an issue is updated (title, description, status, assignee, priority, labels, etc.)

Issue.remove.description: Triggered when an issue is deleted or permanently removed

Comment.create.description: Triggered when a new comment is added to an issue, project update, or initiative update

Comment.update.description: Triggered when a comment is edited

Comment.remove.description: Triggered when a comment is deleted

Project.create.description: Triggered when a new project is created

Project.update.description: Triggered when a project is updated (name, description, status, lead, target date, health, etc.)

Project.remove.description: Triggered when a project is deleted or permanently removed

ProjectUpdate.create.description: Triggered when a new status update is posted on a project

ProjectUpdate.update.description: Triggered when a project status update is edited

ProjectUpdate.remove.description: Triggered when a project status update is deleted

Cycle.create.description: Triggered when a new cycle (sprint) is created

Cycle.update.description: Triggered when a cycle is updated (name, dates, progress, etc.)

Cycle.remove.description: Triggered when a cycle is deleted

IssueLabel.create.description: Triggered when a new issue label is created

IssueLabel.update.description: Triggered when an issue label is updated (name, color, description)

IssueLabel.remove.description: Triggered when an issue label is deleted

Attachment.create.description: Triggered when a URL, file, or external resource is attached to an issue

Attachment.update.description: Triggered when an issue attachment is updated

Attachment.remove.description: Triggered when an issue attachment is deleted

Document.create.description: Triggered when a new document is created

Document.update.description: Triggered when a document is updated (title, content, etc.)

Document.remove.description: Triggered when a document is deleted or trashed

Reaction.create.description: Triggered when an emoji reaction is added to a comment, issue, or project update

Reaction.update.description: Triggered when an emoji reaction is changed

Reaction.remove.description: Triggered when an emoji reaction is removed

User.create.description: Triggered when a new user is added to the workspace

User.update.description: Triggered when a user profile is updated (name, email, role, active status, etc.)

User.remove.description: Triggered when a user is removed from the workspace

Initiative.create.description: Triggered when a new initiative is created

Initiative.update.description: Triggered when an initiative is updated (name, description, status, health, etc.)

Initiative.remove.description: Triggered when an initiative is deleted or archived

InitiativeUpdate.create.description: Triggered when a new status update is posted on an initiative

InitiativeUpdate.update.description: Triggered when an initiative status update is edited

InitiativeUpdate.remove.description: Triggered when an initiative status update is deleted

Customer.create.description: Triggered when a new customer is created

Customer.update.description: Triggered when a customer is updated (name, domains, status, tier, etc.)

Customer.remove.description: Triggered when a customer is deleted

CustomerNeed.create.description: Triggered when a new customer need (request) is created

CustomerNeed.update.description: Triggered when a customer need is updated

CustomerNeed.remove.description: Triggered when a customer need is deleted or archived

IssueSLA.set.description: Triggered when an SLA is applied to an issue

IssueSLA.highRisk.description: Triggered when an issue is at high risk of breaching its SLA

IssueSLA.breached.description: Triggered when an issue has breached its SLA deadline

action.description: The action that was performed: create, update, or remove

type.description: The resource type affected: Issue, Comment, Project, ProjectUpdate, Cycle, IssueLabel, Attachment, Document, Reaction, User, Initiative, InitiativeUpdate, Customer, CustomerNeed

actor.description: The actor who performed the action. Contains id, type (user | oauthClient | integration), name. For user actors also includes email and url

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event was created

data.description: The full entity object after the action. Structure varies by type — for Issues includes id, identifier, title, description, priority, priorityLabel, stateId, state, teamId, team, assigneeId, assignee, projectId, cycleId, labelIds, labels, estimate, dueDate, url, createdAt, updatedAt. For Comments includes id, body, userId, user, issueId, issue, parentId, resolvedAt, reactionData. For Projects includes id, name, description, state, status, health, color, icon, content, startDate, targetDate, creatorId, url. For Cycles includes id, name, number, startsAt, endsAt, teamId, completedAt

updatedFrom.description: For update actions only. Contains the previous values of fields that changed (e.g. previous title, stateId, assigneeId, priority). Null for create and remove actions

url.description: URL to the resource in the Linear web application

organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the Linear organization (workspace)

webhookId.description: The unique identifier of the webhook subscription that matched this event

webhookTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the webhook was dispatched

action.description: The SLA action: set, highRisk, or breached

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event was created

issueData.description: The full issue object that the SLA applies to, with same structure as Issue webhook data (id, identifier, title, stateId, teamId, priority, etc.)

url.description: URL to the issue in the Linear web application

organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the Linear organization (workspace)

webhookId.description: The unique identifier of the webhook subscription that matched this event

webhookTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the webhook was dispatched
